// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ph = ta.pivothigh(high, swingLen, swingLen)
pl = ta.pivotlow(low,  swingLen, swingLen)

// Pending candidates waiting to be broken
var float[] pendHighVal = array.new_float()
var int[]   pendHighBar = array.new_int()
var float[] pendHighTop = array.new_float()
var float[] pendHighBot = array.new_float()

var float[] pendLowVal  = array.new_float()
var int[]   pendLowBar  = array.new_int()
var float[] pendLowTop  = array.new_float()
var float[] pendLowBot  = array.new_float()

// Active breaker storage
var box[]   brkBox  = array.new_box()
var float[] brkTop  = array.new_float()
var float[] brkBot  = array.new_float()
var bool[]  brkMit  = array.new_bool()
var bool[]  brkBull = array.new_bool()
var label[] brkLbl  = array.new_label()

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
//  ADD BREAKER FUNCTION
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
addBreaker(isBull, swBar, swTop, swBot) =>
    if array.size(brkBox) >= maxWalls
        old = array.shift(brkBox)
        box.delete(old)
        array.shift(brkTop)
        array.shift(brkBot)
        array.shift(brkMit)
        array.shift(brkBull)
        oldL = array.shift(brkLbl)
        label.delete(oldL)

    fill = isBull ? cBullFill : cBearFill
    bord = isBull ? cBullBord : cBearBord
    lbY  = isBull ? swTop     : swBot
    txt  = isBull ? "BULL BREAKER ▲" : "BEAR BREAKER ▼"
    tip  = isBull ?
           "Bullish Breaker: Swing HIGH broken by body close → support zone. Buy reactions expected on return." :
           "Bearish Breaker: Swing LOW broken by body close → resistance zone. Sell reactions expected on return."

    newBox = box.new(swBar, swTop, bar_index + extendBars, swBot,
                     bgcolor=fill, border_color=bord, border_width=1)
    newLbl = showLabels ?
             label.new(swBar, lbY, txt, color=bord, textcolor=color.white,
                       style=label.style_label_right, size=lbSize, tooltip=tip) :
             label.new(bar_index, close, "", color=color.new(color.white, 100), size=size.tiny)

    array.push(brkBox,  newBox)
    array.push(brkTop,  swTop)
    array.push(brkBot,  swBot)
    array.push(brkMit,  false)
    array.push(brkBull, isBull)
    array.push(brkLbl,  newLbl)

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
//  REGISTER NEW PIVOTS AS CANDIDATES
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
pivotBarIdx = bar_index - swingLen

if not na(ph)
    pTop = bodyOnly ? math.max(open[swingLen], close[swingLen]) : high[swingLen]
    pBot = bodyOnly ? math.min(open[swingLen], close[swingLen]) : low[swingLen]
    array.push(pendHighVal, ph)
    array.push(pendHighBar, pivotBarIdx)
    array.push(pendHighTop, pTop)
    array.push(pendHighBot, pBot)
    if array.size(pendHighVal) > maxWalls * 3
        array.shift(pendHighVal)
        array.shift(pendHighBar)
        array.shift(pendHighTop)
        array.shift(pendHighBot)

if not na(pl)
    pTop2 = bodyOnly ? math.max(open[swingLen], close[swingLen]) : high[swingLen]
    pBot2 = bodyOnly ? math.min(open[swingLen], close[swingLen]) : low[swingLen]
    array.push(pendLowVal,  pl)
    array.push(pendLowBar,  pivotBarIdx)
    array.push(pendLowTop,  pTop2)
    array.push(pendLowBot,  pBot2)
    if array.size(pendLowVal) > maxWalls * 3
        array.shift(pendLowVal)
        array.shift(pendLowBar)
        array.shift(pendLowTop)
        array.shift(pendLowBot)

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
//  PER-BAR EVENT FLAGS
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
var bool newBullWall = false
var bool newBearWall = false
var bool hitBullZone = false
var bool hitBearZone = false

newBullWall := false
newBearWall := false
hitBullZone := false
hitBearZone := false

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
//  ACTIVATION CHECK (confirmed bars only — no repainting)
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
if barstate.isconfirmed
    // Swing HIGH broken → Bullish Breaker
    if showBull
        i = 0
        while i < array.size(pendHighVal)
            if close > array.get(pendHighVal, i)
                addBreaker(true,
                           array.get(pendHighBar, i),
                           array.get(pendHighTop, i),
                           array.get(pendHighBot, i))
                array.remove(pendHighVal, i)
                array.remove(pendHighBar, i)
                array.remove(pendHighTop, i)
                array.remove(pendHighBot, i)
                newBullWall := true
                i -= 1
            i += 1

    // Swing LOW broken → Bearish Breaker
    if showBear
        j = 0
        while j < array.size(pendLowVal)
            if close < array.get(pendLowVal, j)
                addBreaker(false,
                           array.get(pendLowBar, j),
                           array.get(pendLowTop, j),
                           array.get(pendLowBot, j))
                array.remove(pendLowVal, j)
                array.remove(pendLowBar, j)
                array.remove(pendLowTop, j)
                array.remove(pendLowBot, j)
                newBearWall := true
                j -= 1
            j += 1

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
//  EXTEND BOXES + DETECT MITIGATION
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
if array.size(brkBox) > 0
    for k = 0 to array.size(brkBox) - 1
        isMit  = array.get(brkMit,  k)
        isBull = array.get(brkBull, k)
        bT     = array.get(brkTop,  k)
        bB     = array.get(brkBot,  k)
        b      = array.get(brkBox,  k)

        if not isMit
            box.set_right(b, bar_index + extendBars)
            if high >= bB and low <= bT
                array.set(brkMit, k, true)
                if showMit
                    box.set_bgcolor(b, cMitFill)
                    box.set_border_color(b, cMitBord)
                else
                    box.delete(b)
                if isBull
                    hitBullZone := true
                else
                    hitBearZone := true

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
//  DASHBOARD
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
if barstate.islast
    aBull = 0
    aBear = 0
    if array.size(brkBull) > 0
        for m = 0 to array.size(brkBull) - 1
            if not array.get(brkMit, m)
                if array.get(brkBull, m)
                    aBull += 1
                else
                    aBear += 1

    var table dash = table.new(position.top_right, 2, 6,
                                bgcolor      = color.new(#0d1117, 5),
                                border_color = color.new(color.white, 80),
                                border_width = 1,
                                frame_color  = color.new(color.white, 50),
                                frame_width  = 1)

    table.cell(dash, 0, 0, "ICC BREAKERS", text_color=color.white,           text_size=lbSize, bgcolor=color.new(#161b22, 0), text_halign=text.align_center)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 0, syminfo.ticker, text_color=color.new(#26a69a, 0), text_size=lbSize, bgcolor=color.new(#161b22, 0))

    table.cell(dash, 0, 1, "BULL WALLS",   text_color=color.new(#9e9e9e, 0), text_size=lbSize)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 1, str.tostring(aBull) + " active",
               text_color=aBull > 0 ? #26a69a : color.new(#9e9e9e, 0), text_size=lbSize)

    table.cell(dash, 0, 2, "BEAR WALLS",   text_color=color.new(#9e9e9e, 0), text_size=lbSize)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 2, str.tostring(aBear) + " active",
               text_color=aBear > 0 ? #ef5350 : color.new(#9e9e9e, 0), text_size=lbSize)

    nearBullStr = "—"
    if array.size(brkTop) > 0
        nv = float(na)
        for n = 0 to array.size(brkTop) - 1
            if not array.get(brkMit, n) and array.get(brkBull, n)
                v = array.get(brkTop, n)
                if na(nv) or math.abs(v - close) < math.abs(nv - close)
                    nv := v
        if not na(nv)
            nearBullStr := str.tostring(nv, format.mintick)
    table.cell(dash, 0, 3, "NEAREST BULL", text_color=color.new(#9e9e9e, 0), text_size=lbSize)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 3, nearBullStr,    text_color=#26a69a,                text_size=lbSize)

    nearBearStr = "—"
    if array.size(brkBot) > 0
        nv2 = float(na)
        for o = 0 to array.size(brkBot) - 1
            if not array.get(brkMit, o) and not array.get(brkBull, o)
                v2 = array.get(brkBot, o)
                if na(nv2) or math.abs(v2 - close) < math.abs(nv2 - close)
                    nv2 := v2
        if not na(nv2)
            nearBearStr := str.tostring(nv2, format.mintick)
    table.cell(dash, 0, 4, "NEAREST BEAR", text_color=color.new(#9e9e9e, 0), text_size=lbSize)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 4, nearBearStr,    text_color=#ef5350,                text_size=lbSize)

    evtTxt = newBullWall ? "🟢 BULL WALL FORMED" : newBearWall ? "🔴 BEAR WALL FORMED" :
             hitBullZone ? "⚡ BULL ZONE TAPPED"  : hitBearZone ? "⚡ BEAR ZONE TAPPED" : "—"
    evtClr = newBullWall or hitBullZone ? #26a69a :
             newBearWall or hitBearZone ? #ef5350 : color.new(#9e9e9e, 0)
    table.cell(dash, 0, 5, "LAST EVENT",   text_color=color.new(#9e9e9e, 0), text_size=lbSize)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 5, evtTxt,         text_color=evtClr,                text_size=lbSize)

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
//  ALERTS
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
alertcondition(newBullWall, "🟢 Bullish Breaker Wall Formed",
               "ICC Breakers: Swing HIGH broken by body close. Bullish breaker activated — zone is now support on return.")
alertcondition(newBearWall, "🔴 Bearish Breaker Wall Formed",
               "ICC Breakers: Swing LOW broken by body close. Bearish breaker activated — zone is now resistance on return.")
alertcondition(hitBullZone, "⚡ Price Entered Bull Breaker Zone",
               "ICC Breakers: Price tapped into a bullish breaker zone. Watch for buy reaction.")
alertcondition(hitBearZone, "⚡ Price Entered Bear Breaker Zone",
               "ICC Breakers: Price tapped into a bearish breaker zone. Watch for sell reaction.")
alertcondition(newBullWall or newBearWall, "🔔 New Breaker Wall",      "ICC Breakers: New breaker wall just formed.")
alertcondition(hitBullZone or hitBearZone, "🔔 Price in Breaker Zone", "ICC Breakers: Price entering an active breaker zone.")

title: ICC Final Boss Target
subtitle: Marks the primary ICC take-profit target with R:R calculator and extended levels
description: Automatically identifies the Final Boss — the nearest untested swing extreme in your trade direction. This is ICC's primary take-profit target after BOS confirmation. Shows Boss 2 and Boss 3 for extended targets, plus 1.5R/2R/3R lines calculated from your entry. Dashboard shows distance %, R:R ratio, and alerts when price approaches or reaches the target.

features.label: Final Boss Level
features.desc: Auto-detects the nearest untested swing extreme above (bull) or below (bear) — ICC primary TP

features.label: Boss 2 & Boss 3
features.desc: Next two swing extremes beyond the Final Boss for extended ICC targets

features.label: R:R Lines (1.5R 2R 3R)
features.desc: Extension levels calculated from your entry and stop — see if Final Boss gives good R:R

features.label: Manual Entry & Stop
features.desc: Enter your exact entry price and stop loss for precise R:R calculation

features.label: Dashboard
features.desc: Direction, Final Boss level, distance %, R:R ratio, and live status

settings: Use on 1H chart with HTF set to 4H. Enable Manual Entry and type your BOS entry price and HL/LH stop loss for exact R:R. Only take trades where Final Boss gives 2R minimum per ICC rules.
code:
//@version=6
indicator("ICC Final Boss Target", "ICC FB", overlay=true,
          max_bars_back=500, max_labels_count=500, max_lines_count=500)

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
//  INPUTS
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
grpS = "⚙ Swing Detection"
swingLen = input.int(10, "Pivot Lookback", minval=3, maxval=50, group=grpS)
htfTF    = input.timeframe("240", "HTF Timeframe", group=grpS)

grpD = "🎯 Direction"
dirMode = input.string("Auto (HTF Bias)", "Trade Direction",
          options=["Auto (HTF Bias)", "Bullish Only", "Bearish Only"], group=grpD)

grpT = "📐 Targets"
showFB   = input.bool(true,  "Show Final Boss Level",           group=grpT)
showExt  = input.bool(true,  "Show Extended Targets (1.5R 2R 3R)", group=grpT)
showRR   = input.bool(true,  "Show R:R Labels on Lines",        group=grpT)
alertPct = input.float(0.5, "Proximity Alert (% from Boss)",   minval=0.1, maxval=5.0, step=0.1, group=grpT)

grpE = "📍 Entry & Stop (for R:R)"
useManual   = input.bool(false, "Manual Entry & Stop",  group=grpE)
manualEntry = input.float(0.0,  "Entry Price",           group=grpE)
manualSL    = input.float(0.0,  "Stop Loss Price",       group=grpE)

grpV = "🖥 Visuals"
showDash = input.bool(true,     "Show Dashboard",  group=grpV)
lbSzStr  = input.string("small","Label Size", options=["tiny","small","normal","large","huge"], group=grpV)

grpC = "🎨 Colors"
cBoss = input.color(#f59e0b, "Final Boss",  group=grpC)
cExt1 = input.color(#8b5cf6, "1.5R Line",  group=grpC)
cExt2 = input.color(#ec4899, "2R Line",    group=grpC)
cExt3 = input.color(#06b6d4, "3R Line",    group=grpC)
cBull = input.color(#26a69a, "Bullish",    group=grpC)
cBear = input.color(#ef5350, "Bearish",    group=grpC)
cN    = input.color(#9e9e9e, "Neutral",    group=grpC)

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
//  HELPERS
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
lbSize = lbSzStr == "tiny"   ? size.tiny   :
         lbSzStr == "small"  ? size.small  :
         lbSzStr == "normal" ? size.normal :
         lbSzStr == "large"  ? size.large  : size.huge
atr14  = ta.atr(14)

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
//  HTF BIAS
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
htfC    = request.security(syminfo.tickerid, htfTF, close[1], lookahead=barmerge.lookahead_off)
htfH    = request.security(syminfo.tickerid, htfTF, high[1],  lookahead=barmerge.lookahead_off)
htfL    = request.security(syminfo.tickerid, htfTF, low[1],   lookahead=barmerge.lookahead_off)
htfBull = htfC > (htfH + htfL) / 2

isBull = dirMode == "Bullish Only" ? true :
         dirMode == "Bearish Only" ? false : htfBull

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
//  SWING DETECTION
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ph = ta.pivothigh(high, swingLen, swingLen)
pl = ta.pivotlow(low,  swingLen, swingLen)

var float[] swingHighs    = array.new_float()
var int[]   swingHighBars = array.new_int()
var float[] swingLows     = array.new_float()
var int[]   swingLowBars  = array.new_int()

if not na(ph)
    array.push(swingHighs, ph)
    array.push(swingHighBars, bar_index - swingLen)
    if array.size(swingHighs) > 30
        array.shift(swingHighs)
        array.shift(swingHighBars)

if not na(pl)
    array.push(swingLows, pl)
    array.push(swingLowBars, bar_index - swingLen)
    if array.size(swingLows) > 30
        array.shift(swingLows)
        array.shift(swingLowBars)

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
//  FINAL BOSS DETECTION
//  Bull: nearest untested swing HIGH above current price
//  Bear: nearest untested swing LOW below current price
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
finalBoss = float(na)
fbBar     = int(na)

if isBull and array.size(swingHighs) > 0
    nearest = float(na)
    nearBar = int(na)
    for i = 0 to array.size(swingHighs) - 1
        sh = array.get(swingHighs, i)
        sb = array.get(swingHighBars, i)
        if sh > close
            if na(nearest) or sh < nearest
                nearest := sh
                nearBar  := sb
    finalBoss := nearest
    fbBar     := nearBar

if not isBull and array.size(swingLows) > 0
    nearest2 = float(na)
    nearBar2 = int(na)
    for i = 0 to array.size(swingLows) - 1
        sl = array.get(swingLows, i)
        sb = array.get(swingLowBars, i)
        if sl < close
            if na(nearest2) or sl > nearest2
                nearest2 := sl
                nearBar2  := sb
    finalBoss := nearest2
    fbBar     := nearBar2

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
//  ALSO TRACK SECOND & THIRD BOSS (extended swing targets)
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
boss2 = float(na)
boss3 = float(na)

if isBull and array.size(swingHighs) > 0
    found1 = false
    found2 = false
    for i = 0 to array.size(swingHighs) - 1
        sh = array.get(swingHighs, i)
        if sh > close
            if not found1
                found1 := true
            else if not found2
                boss2  := sh
                found2  := true
            else if not na(boss2)
                boss3  := sh
                break

if not isBull and array.size(swingLows) > 0
    found1b = false
    found2b = false
    for i = array.size(swingLows) - 1 to 0
        sl = array.get(swingLows, i)
        if sl < close
            if not found1b
                found1b := true
            else if not found2b
                boss2   := sl
                found2b  := true
            else if not na(boss2)
                boss3   := sl
                break

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
//  R:R CALCULATION
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
entryRef = useManual and manualEntry > 0 ? manualEntry : close
slRef    = useManual and manualSL > 0    ? manualSL    :
           isBull ? close - atr14 * 2 : close + atr14 * 2

riskAmt   = math.abs(entryRef - slRef)
rewardAmt = not na(finalBoss) ? math.abs(finalBoss - entryRef) : na
rrRatio   = not na(rewardAmt) and riskAmt > 0 ? rewardAmt / riskAmt : na

// R:R multiples for extended levels (off entry + stop)
rr15Level = not na(finalBoss) ? (isBull ? entryRef + riskAmt * 1.5 : entryRef - riskAmt * 1.5) : na
rr2Level  = not na(finalBoss) ? (isBull ? entryRef + riskAmt * 2.0 : entryRef - riskAmt * 2.0) : na
rr3Level  = not na(finalBoss) ? (isBull ? entryRef + riskAmt * 3.0 : entryRef - riskAmt * 3.0) : na

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
//  DRAW LINES & LABELS (only on last bar to avoid clutter)
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
var line  fbLine    = na
var line  b2Line    = na
var line  b3Line    = na
var line  rr15Ln    = na
var line  rr2Ln     = na
var line  rr3Ln     = na
var label fbLbl     = na
var label b2Lbl     = na
var label b3Lbl     = na
var label rr15Lbl   = na
var label rr2Lbl    = na
var label rr3Lbl    = na

if barstate.islast
    startBar = bar_index - 60

    // Final Boss
    if showFB and not na(finalBoss)
        line.delete(fbLine)
        label.delete(fbLbl)
        fbLine := line.new(startBar, finalBoss, bar_index + 40, finalBoss,
                           color=cBoss, width=2, style=line.style_dashed)
        rrStr  = not na(rrRatio) ? "  ← FINAL BOSS  " + str.tostring(rrRatio, "#.##") + "R  " : "  ← FINAL BOSS  "
        fbLbl  := label.new(bar_index + 40, finalBoss, rrStr,
                            color=cBoss, textcolor=color.black,
                            style=label.style_label_left, size=lbSize,
                            tooltip="The Final Boss: The nearest untested swing extreme in your trade direction.\nThis is ICC's primary take-profit target.")

    // Boss 2 (next swing)
    if showFB and not na(boss2)
        line.delete(b2Line)
        label.delete(b2Lbl)
        b2Line := line.new(startBar, boss2, bar_index + 40, boss2,
                           color=color.new(cBoss, 60), width=1, style=line.style_dotted)
        b2Lbl  := label.new(bar_index + 40, boss2, "  ← BOSS 2  ",
                            color=color.new(cBoss, 50), textcolor=cBoss,
                            style=label.style_label_left, size=lbSize,
                            tooltip="Boss 2: The next swing extreme beyond the Final Boss — ICC extended target.")

    // Boss 3
    if showFB and not na(boss3)
        line.delete(b3Line)
        label.delete(b3Lbl)
        b3Line := line.new(startBar, boss3, bar_index + 40, boss3,
                           color=color.new(cBoss, 80), width=1, style=line.style_dotted)
        b3Lbl  := label.new(bar_index + 40, boss3, "  ← BOSS 3  ",
                            color=color.new(cBoss, 70), textcolor=color.new(cBoss, 30),
                            style=label.style_label_left, size=lbSize,
                            tooltip="Boss 3: Third swing target — maximum extension zone.")

    // R:R extension lines
    if showExt and not na(rr15Level)
        line.delete(rr15Ln)
        label.delete(rr15Lbl)
        rr15Ln  := line.new(bar_index - 30, rr15Level, bar_index + 40, rr15Level,
                            color=color.new(cExt1, 60), width=1, style=line.style_dotted)
        rr15Lbl := showRR ? label.new(bar_index + 40, rr15Level, "  1.5R  ",
                            color=color.new(cExt1, 70), textcolor=cExt1,
                            style=label.style_label_left, size=lbSize) :
                            label.new(0, 0, "", color=color.new(color.white, 100), size=size.tiny)

    if showExt and not na(rr2Level)
        line.delete(rr2Ln)
        label.delete(rr2Lbl)
        rr2Ln  := line.new(bar_index - 30, rr2Level, bar_index + 40, rr2Level,
                           color=color.new(cExt2, 60), width=1, style=line.style_dotted)
        rr2Lbl := showRR ? label.new(bar_index + 40, rr2Level, "  2R  ",
                           color=color.new(cExt2, 70), textcolor=cExt2,
                           style=label.style_label_left, size=lbSize) :
                           label.new(0, 0, "", color=color.new(color.white, 100), size=size.tiny)

    if showExt and not na(rr3Level)
        line.delete(rr3Ln)
        label.delete(rr3Lbl)
        rr3Ln  := line.new(bar_index - 30, rr3Level, bar_index + 40, rr3Level,
                           color=color.new(cExt3, 60), width=1, style=line.style_dotted)
        rr3Lbl := showRR ? label.new(bar_index + 40, rr3Level, "  3R  ",
                           color=color.new(cExt3, 70), textcolor=cExt3,
                           style=label.style_label_left, size=lbSize) :
                           label.new(0, 0, "", color=color.new(color.white, 100), size=size.tiny)

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
//  EVENTS
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
fbReached  = not na(finalBoss) and (isBull ? high >= finalBoss : low <= finalBoss)
distPct    = not na(finalBoss) ? math.abs(finalBoss - close) / close * 100 : float(na)
fbApproach = not na(distPct) and distPct <= alertPct and not fbReached

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
//  DASHBOARD
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
if showDash and barstate.islast
    var table dash = table.new(position.top_right, 2, 8,
                                bgcolor      = color.new(#0d1117, 5),
                                border_color = color.new(color.white, 80),
                                border_width = 1,
                                frame_color  = color.new(color.white, 50),
                                frame_width  = 1)

    table.cell(dash, 0, 0, "FINAL BOSS",   text_color=color.white,           text_size=lbSize, bgcolor=color.new(#161b22, 0), text_halign=text.align_center)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 0, syminfo.ticker, text_color=color.new(#26a69a, 0), text_size=lbSize, bgcolor=color.new(#161b22, 0))

    table.cell(dash, 0, 1, "DIRECTION",    text_color=cN, text_size=lbSize)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 1, isBull ? "BULLISH ▲" : "BEARISH ▼",
               text_color=isBull ? cBull : cBear, text_size=lbSize)

    table.cell(dash, 0, 2, "FINAL BOSS",   text_color=cN, text_size=lbSize)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 2, not na(finalBoss) ? str.tostring(finalBoss, format.mintick) : "—",
               text_color=cBoss, text_size=lbSize)

    table.cell(dash, 0, 3, "BOSS 2",       text_color=cN, text_size=lbSize)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 3, not na(boss2) ? str.tostring(boss2, format.mintick) : "—",
               text_color=color.new(cBoss, 40), text_size=lbSize)

    table.cell(dash, 0, 4, "DISTANCE",     text_color=cN, text_size=lbSize)
    distTxt = not na(distPct) ? str.tostring(distPct, "#.##") + "%" : "—"
    distClr = not na(distPct) and distPct <= alertPct ? color.orange : cN
    table.cell(dash, 1, 4, distTxt, text_color=distClr, text_size=lbSize)

    table.cell(dash, 0, 5, "R:R TO BOSS",  text_color=cN, text_size=lbSize)
    rrTxt = not na(rrRatio) ? str.tostring(rrRatio, "#.##") + "R" : "—"
    rrClr = not na(rrRatio) ? (rrRatio >= 3.0 ? cBull : rrRatio >= 2.0 ? color.new(cBull, 30) : rrRatio >= 1.0 ? color.orange : cBear) : cN
    table.cell(dash, 1, 5, rrTxt, text_color=rrClr, text_size=lbSize)

    table.cell(dash, 0, 6, "ENTRY REF",    text_color=cN, text_size=lbSize)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 6, str.tostring(entryRef, format.mintick),
               text_color=cN, text_size=lbSize)

    statTxt = fbReached  ? "✅ BOSS REACHED"  :
              fbApproach ? "⚠ APPROACHING"    : "🎯 IN PROGRESS"
    statClr = fbReached  ? cBull :
              fbApproach ? color.orange : cN
    table.cell(dash, 0, 7, "STATUS",       text_color=cN, text_size=lbSize)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 7, statTxt, text_color=statClr, text_size=lbSize)

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
//  ALERTS
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
alertcondition(fbReached,  "🏆 Final Boss REACHED",
               "ICC Final Boss: Price has reached the Final Boss target. Consider full TP or partial close per your plan.")
alertcondition(fbApproach, "⚠ Approaching Final Boss",
               "ICC Final Boss: Price is within proximity alert of the Final Boss level. Prepare your TP action.")
alertcondition(not na(finalBoss) and ta.change(finalBoss) != 0, "🎯 Final Boss Level Updated",
               "ICC Final Boss: The Final Boss target level has changed — a new swing extreme is now the primary target.")

title: ICC Session Boxes
subtitle: Asia / TWT / NY session boxes with H/L lines, sweeps, countdown & dashboard
description: All three trading sessions in one indicator. Draws live session boxes for Asia (8PM-2AM EST), TWT/London (2AM-8AM EST), and NY (8AM-11:30AM EST). Extends H/L reference lines after each session ends. Detects and marks liquidity sweeps when price takes out a session high or low. Dashboard shows current session, NY countdown timer, and all session H/L levels. Background tints active session windows.

features.label: 3 Session Boxes
features.desc: Live boxes for Asia, TWT/London, and NY — extend in real time, lock on session close

features.label: Session H/L Lines
features.desc: Dashed H and L lines extend right after each session closes — key liquidity levels

features.label: Sweep Detection
features.desc: Marks when price takes out a session high or low — 🔫 label with alert

features.label: NY Countdown
features.desc: Dashboard shows exact time remaining until the 8AM EST ICC trading window opens

features.label: Dashboard
features.desc: Current session, NY countdown, Asia/TWT/NY high and low levels all in one table

alerts: 🟢 NY Session OPEN — ICC Window Live
settings: Works on any timeframe — 1H recommended. All times in EST (America/New_York). Enable the NY Session Open alert so you get notified at 8AM every trading day. The sweep alert is critical — session sweeps often precede the ICC Correction phase.
code:
//@version=6
indicator("ICC Session Boxes", "ICC Sess", overlay=true,
          max_bars_back=500, max_labels_count=500, max_lines_count=500, max_boxes_count=200)

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
//  INPUTS
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
grpS = "🕐 Sessions (All times EST)"
showAsia  = input.bool(true, "Show Asia Session  (8PM–2AM)",    group=grpS)
showTWT   = input.bool(true, "Show TWT/London    (2AM–8AM)",    group=grpS)
showNY    = input.bool(true, "Show NY Session    (8AM–11:30AM)", group=grpS)
numSess   = input.int(2,     "Show Last N Sessions", minval=1, maxval=4, group=grpS)

grpV = "🖥 Visuals"
showBG    = input.bool(true,     "Session Background Tint",  group=grpV)
showSwp   = input.bool(true,     "Show Sweep Markers",       group=grpV)
showHL    = input.bool(true,     "Show Session H/L Lines",   group=grpV)
showDash  = input.bool(true,     "Show Dashboard",           group=grpV)
lbSzStr   = input.string("small","Label Size", options=["tiny","small","normal","large","huge"], group=grpV)

grpC = "🎨 Colors"
cAsia     = input.color(color.new(#3b82f6, 88), "Asia Fill",       group=grpC)
cAsiaBrd  = input.color(#3b82f6,               "Asia Border",      group=grpC)
cTWT      = input.color(color.new(#8b5cf6, 88), "TWT Fill",        group=grpC)
cTWTBrd   = input.color(#8b5cf6,               "TWT Border",       group=grpC)
cNY       = input.color(color.new(#26a69a, 88), "NY Fill",         group=grpC)
cNYBrd    = input.color(#26a69a,               "NY Border",        group=grpC)
cSwp      = input.color(#f59e0b,               "Sweep Marker",     group=grpC)
cN        = input.color(#9e9e9e,               "Neutral Text",     group=grpC)

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
//  HELPERS
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
lbSize = lbSzStr == "tiny"   ? size.tiny   :
         lbSzStr == "small"  ? size.small  :
         lbSzStr == "normal" ? size.normal :
         lbSzStr == "large"  ? size.large  : size.huge

tz = "America/New_York"

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
//  SESSION DETECTION
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
inAsia = not na(time("", "2000-0200", tz))
inTWT  = not na(time("", "0200-0800", tz))
inNY   = not na(time("", "0800-1130", tz))

newAsia = inAsia and not inAsia[1]
newTWT  = inTWT  and not inTWT[1]
newNY   = inNY   and not inNY[1]

endAsia = not inAsia and inAsia[1]
endTWT  = not inTWT  and inTWT[1]
endNY   = not inNY   and inNY[1]

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
//  SESSION H/L TRACKING
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
var float asiaH = na
var float asiaL = na
var int   asiaStartBar = na

var float twtH = na
var float twtL = na
var int   twtStartBar = na

var float nyH = na
var float nyL = na
var int   nyStartBar = na

// Asia
if newAsia
    asiaH        := high
    asiaL        := low
    asiaStartBar := bar_index

if inAsia
    asiaH := math.max(asiaH, high)
    asiaL := math.min(asiaL, low)

// TWT
if newTWT
    twtH        := high
    twtL        := low
    twtStartBar := bar_index

if inTWT
    twtH := math.max(twtH, high)
    twtL := math.min(twtL, low)

// NY
if newNY
    nyH        := high
    nyL        := low
    nyStartBar := bar_index

if inNY
    nyH := math.max(nyH, high)
    nyL := math.min(nyL, low)

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
//  SESSION BOXES
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
var box[] asiaBoxes = array.new_box()
var box[] twtBoxes  = array.new_box()
var box[] nyBoxes   = array.new_box()

// Create box on session start
if newAsia and showAsia
    if array.size(asiaBoxes) >= numSess
        old = array.shift(asiaBoxes)
        box.delete(old)
    newB = box.new(bar_index, high, bar_index + 1, low,
                   bgcolor=cAsia, border_color=cAsiaBrd, border_width=1)
    array.push(asiaBoxes, newB)

if newTWT and showTWT
    if array.size(twtBoxes) >= numSess
        old = array.shift(twtBoxes)
        box.delete(old)
    newB = box.new(bar_index, high, bar_index + 1, low,
                   bgcolor=cTWT, border_color=cTWTBrd, border_width=1)
    array.push(twtBoxes, newB)

if newNY and showNY
    if array.size(nyBoxes) >= numSess
        old = array.shift(nyBoxes)
        box.delete(old)
    newB = box.new(bar_index, high, bar_index + 1, low,
                   bgcolor=cNY, border_color=cNYBrd, border_width=1)
    array.push(nyBoxes, newB)

// Extend active session box
if inAsia and showAsia and array.size(asiaBoxes) > 0
    b = array.last(asiaBoxes)
    box.set_top(b, asiaH)
    box.set_bottom(b, asiaL)
    box.set_right(b, bar_index + 2)

if inTWT and showTWT and array.size(twtBoxes) > 0
    b = array.last(twtBoxes)
    box.set_top(b, twtH)
    box.set_bottom(b, twtL)
    box.set_right(b, bar_index + 2)

if inNY and showNY and array.size(nyBoxes) > 0
    b = array.last(nyBoxes)
    box.set_top(b, nyH)
    box.set_bottom(b, nyL)
    box.set_right(b, bar_index + 2)

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
//  SESSION H/L REFERENCE LINES (extend right after session ends)
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
var line asiaHLine = na
var line asiaLLine = na
var line twtHLine  = na
var line twtLLine  = na
var line nyHLine   = na
var line nyLLine   = na

var label asiaHLbl = na
var label asiaLLbl = na
var label twtHLbl  = na
var label twtLLbl  = na
var label nyHLbl   = na
var label nyLLbl   = na

if endAsia and showHL and not na(asiaStartBar)
    line.delete(asiaHLine)
    line.delete(asiaLLine)
    label.delete(asiaHLbl)
    label.delete(asiaLLbl)
    asiaHLine := line.new(asiaStartBar, asiaH, bar_index + 150, asiaH,
                          color=color.new(cAsiaBrd, 40), style=line.style_dashed, width=1)
    asiaLLine := line.new(asiaStartBar, asiaL, bar_index + 150, asiaL,
                          color=color.new(cAsiaBrd, 40), style=line.style_dashed, width=1)
    asiaHLbl  := label.new(bar_index, asiaH, "Asia H", color=color.new(cAsiaBrd, 60),
                            textcolor=cAsiaBrd, style=label.style_label_left, size=lbSize)
    asiaLLbl  := label.new(bar_index, asiaL, "Asia L", color=color.new(cAsiaBrd, 60),
                            textcolor=cAsiaBrd, style=label.style_label_left, size=lbSize)

if endTWT and showHL and not na(twtStartBar)
    line.delete(twtHLine)
    line.delete(twtLLine)
    label.delete(twtHLbl)
    label.delete(twtLLbl)
    twtHLine := line.new(twtStartBar, twtH, bar_index + 150, twtH,
                         color=color.new(cTWTBrd, 40), style=line.style_dashed, width=1)
    twtLLine := line.new(twtStartBar, twtL, bar_index + 150, twtL,
                         color=color.new(cTWTBrd, 40), style=line.style_dashed, width=1)
    twtHLbl  := label.new(bar_index, twtH, "TWT H", color=color.new(cTWTBrd, 60),
                           textcolor=cTWTBrd, style=label.style_label_left, size=lbSize)
    twtLLbl  := label.new(bar_index, twtL, "TWT L", color=color.new(cTWTBrd, 60),
                           textcolor=cTWTBrd, style=label.style_label_left, size=lbSize)

if endNY and showHL and not na(nyStartBar)
    line.delete(nyHLine)
    line.delete(nyLLine)
    label.delete(nyHLbl)
    label.delete(nyLLbl)
    nyHLine := line.new(nyStartBar, nyH, bar_index + 150, nyH,
                        color=color.new(cNYBrd, 40), style=line.style_dashed, width=1)
    nyLLine := line.new(nyStartBar, nyL, bar_index + 150, nyL,
                        color=color.new(cNYBrd, 40), style=line.style_dashed, width=1)
    nyHLbl  := label.new(bar_index, nyH, "NY H", color=color.new(cNYBrd, 60),
                          textcolor=cNYBrd, style=label.style_label_left, size=lbSize)
    nyLLbl  := label.new(bar_index, nyL, "NY L", color=color.new(cNYBrd, 60),
                          textcolor=cNYBrd, style=label.style_label_left, size=lbSize)

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
//  SESSION BACKGROUND TINT
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
bgcolor(showBG and inAsia and showAsia ? color.new(cAsiaBrd, 94) : na, title="Asia Tint")
bgcolor(showBG and inTWT  and showTWT  ? color.new(cTWTBrd,  94) : na, title="TWT Tint")
bgcolor(showBG and inNY   and showNY   ? color.new(cNYBrd,   92) : na, title="NY Tint")

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
//  SWEEP DETECTION (session H/L taken out)
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
asiaHSwept = showSwp and not inAsia and not na(asiaH) and high > asiaH and not (high[1] > asiaH)
asiaLSwept = showSwp and not inAsia and not na(asiaL) and low  < asiaL and not (low[1]  < asiaL)
twtHSwept  = showSwp and not inTWT  and not na(twtH)  and high > twtH  and not (high[1] > twtH)
twtLSwept  = showSwp and not inTWT  and not na(twtL)  and low  < twtL  and not (low[1]  < twtL)
nyHSwept   = showSwp and not inNY   and not na(nyH)   and high > nyH   and not (high[1] > nyH)
nyLSwept   = showSwp and not inNY   and not na(nyL)   and low  < nyL   and not (low[1]  < nyL)

anySweep = asiaHSwept or asiaLSwept or twtHSwept or twtLSwept or nyHSwept or nyLSwept

if asiaHSwept
    label.new(bar_index, high, "🔫 Asia H", color=cSwp, textcolor=color.black,
              style=label.style_label_down, size=lbSize, tooltip="Asia High Swept — liquidity taken above Asia high.")
if asiaLSwept
    label.new(bar_index, low,  "🔫 Asia L", color=cSwp, textcolor=color.black,
              style=label.style_label_up,   size=lbSize, tooltip="Asia Low Swept — liquidity taken below Asia low.")
if twtHSwept
    label.new(bar_index, high, "🔫 TWT H",  color=cSwp, textcolor=color.black,
              style=label.style_label_down, size=lbSize, tooltip="TWT High Swept — liquidity taken above TWT high.")
if twtLSwept
    label.new(bar_index, low,  "🔫 TWT L",  color=cSwp, textcolor=color.black,
              style=label.style_label_up,   size=lbSize, tooltip="TWT Low Swept — liquidity taken below TWT low.")
if nyHSwept
    label.new(bar_index, high, "🔫 NY H",   color=cSwp, textcolor=color.black,
              style=label.style_label_down, size=lbSize, tooltip="NY High Swept — NY session high taken out.")
if nyLSwept
    label.new(bar_index, low,  "🔫 NY L",   color=cSwp, textcolor=color.black,
              style=label.style_label_up,   size=lbSize, tooltip="NY Low Swept — NY session low taken out.")

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
//  COUNTDOWN TO NY SESSION
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
estH       = hour(time, tz)
estMin     = minute(time, tz)
curMins    = estH * 60 + estMin
nyOpenMins = 8 * 60        // 480 = 8:00 AM
nyCloseMins = 11 * 60 + 30 // 690 = 11:30 AM

minsToNY = inNY ? 0 :
           curMins < nyOpenMins ? nyOpenMins - curMins :
           curMins >= nyCloseMins ? (24 * 60 - curMins) + nyOpenMins : 0

countdownH   = minsToNY / 60
countdownM   = minsToNY % 60
countdownTxt = inNY ? "OPEN NOW ✅" :
               minsToNY == 0 ? "OPEN NOW ✅" :
               str.tostring(countdownH) + "h " + str.tostring(countdownM) + "m"

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
//  DASHBOARD
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
if showDash and barstate.islast
    var table dash = table.new(position.top_right, 2, 9,
                                bgcolor      = color.new(#0d1117, 5),
                                border_color = color.new(color.white, 80),
                                border_width = 1,
                                frame_color  = color.new(color.white, 50),
                                frame_width  = 1)

    // Header
    table.cell(dash, 0, 0, "ICC SESSIONS",  text_color=color.white,           text_size=lbSize, bgcolor=color.new(#161b22, 0), text_halign=text.align_center)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 0, syminfo.ticker,  text_color=color.new(#26a69a, 0), text_size=lbSize, bgcolor=color.new(#161b22, 0))

    // Active session
    sessName = inNY ? "NY SESSION 🟢" : inTWT ? "TWT/LONDON 🟣" : inAsia ? "ASIA 🔵" : "OFF HOURS"
    sessClr  = inNY ? #26a69a : inTWT ? #8b5cf6 : inAsia ? #3b82f6 : cN
    table.cell(dash, 0, 1, "NOW",          text_color=cN,     text_size=lbSize)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 1, sessName,       text_color=sessClr, text_size=lbSize)

    // NY countdown
    table.cell(dash, 0, 2, "NY OPEN",      text_color=cN,      text_size=lbSize)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 2, countdownTxt,   text_color=inNY ? #26a69a : minsToNY < 30 ? color.orange : cN, text_size=lbSize)

    // Asia H/L
    table.cell(dash, 0, 3, "ASIA HIGH",    text_color=cN,      text_size=lbSize)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 3, not na(asiaH) ? str.tostring(asiaH, format.mintick) : "—", text_color=#3b82f6, text_size=lbSize)
    table.cell(dash, 0, 4, "ASIA LOW",     text_color=cN,      text_size=lbSize)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 4, not na(asiaL) ? str.tostring(asiaL, format.mintick) : "—", text_color=#3b82f6, text_size=lbSize)

    // TWT H/L
    table.cell(dash, 0, 5, "TWT HIGH",     text_color=cN,      text_size=lbSize)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 5, not na(twtH) ? str.tostring(twtH, format.mintick) : "—",  text_color=#8b5cf6, text_size=lbSize)
    table.cell(dash, 0, 6, "TWT LOW",      text_color=cN,      text_size=lbSize)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 6, not na(twtL) ? str.tostring(twtL, format.mintick) : "—",  text_color=#8b5cf6, text_size=lbSize)

    // NY H/L
    table.cell(dash, 0, 7, "NY HIGH",      text_color=cN,      text_size=lbSize)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 7, not na(nyH) ? str.tostring(nyH, format.mintick) : "—",    text_color=#26a69a, text_size=lbSize)
    table.cell(dash, 0, 8, "NY LOW",       text_color=cN,      text_size=lbSize)
    table.cell(dash, 1, 8, not na(nyL) ? str.tostring(nyL, format.mintick) : "—",    text_color=#26a69a, text_size=lbSize)

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
//  ALERTS
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
alertcondition(newNY,      "🟢 NY Session OPEN — ICC Window Live",  "ICC Sessions: NY session just opened. 8AM–11:30AM EST is your ICC trading window. Start looking for setups.")
alertcondition(endNY,      "🔴 NY Session CLOSED",                  "ICC Sessions: NY session closed. 11:30AM EST — ICC trading window is over. No new entries.")
alertcondition(newTWT,     "🟣 TWT/London Session Open",            "ICC Sessions: TWT/London session opened. Watch for Asian range sweeps and early liquidity grabs.")
alertcondition(newAsia,    "🔵 Asia Session Open",                  "ICC Sessions: Asia session opened. Track the range being built for tomorrow's setups.")
alertcondition(anySweep,   "🔫 Session Liquidity Swept",            "ICC Sessions: A session high or low has been swept. Liquidity grab in play — watch for reversal.")
alertcondition(asiaHSwept or asiaLSwept, "🔫 Asia Range Swept",    "ICC Sessions: Asia session high or low swept. Key ICC liquidity level taken.")
alertcondition(twtHSwept or twtLSwept,   "🔫 TWT Range Swept",     "ICC Sessions: TWT/London session high or low swept.")
alertcondition(nyHSwept or nyLSwept,     "🔫 NY Range Swept",      "ICC Sessions: NY session high or low swept after session close.")
